name: Chenault Law Firm (Law Office of Gilland Chenault, PLLC)

websiteQuality.rationale: The site is a mobile-responsive WordPress/Avada build with HTTPS, a viewport meta tag, proper title and meta description, repeated phone and contact-form CTAs on every page, and solid trust signals (Super Lawyers and Avvo badge widgets, detailed attorney bios, a former district judge Of Counsel). It is held back by a template-heavy design, no online appointment booking (contact is form-or-phone only), and a heavy page payload from Slider Revolution and page-builder scripts. Local positioning is strong, with Denton and surrounding counties named throughout and a Google Maps embed on the contact page.

factors.mobileUsability: Responsive Avada theme with viewport meta tag (width=device-width, initial-scale=1); mobile-friendly Slider Revolution plugin in use.
factors.pageSpeed: Not directly measured (no lab tooling available). Inference: likely mediocre — 218KB of homepage HTML and 44 script tags including Avada builder, Slider Revolution, and Google Maps API suggest a heavy page.
factors.accessibility: Some ARIA labeling present (22 aria/role attributes); logo image has alt text but at least one decorative image has an empty alt; no obvious accessibility statement.
factors.visualCredibility: Professional but template-driven Avada design; attorney photos and an established-firm narrative; dynamic copyright year keeps footer fresh.
factors.navigation: Clear main nav: Home, Attorney Profiles, Practice Areas (11 listed areas), Probate, Resources, Contact/Map.
factors.contentClarity: Plain-language, well-organized explanations of probate, trusts, estate planning, mediation, and litigation topics aimed at lay clients.
factors.callsToAction: Repeated 'call 972.591.0099 or fill out the form' CTAs after every practice-area section; phone number displayed prominently in header/footer.
factors.contactFormQuality: Gravity Forms contact form (name, email, phone, 600-character message) with reCAPTCHA spam check; promises response in under 48 hours; no direct email address published.
factors.localPositioning: Strong — Denton, Denton County, and Dallas/Tarrant/Collin counties named throughout; Google Maps embed on contact page; separate DentonProbateAttorney.com microsite.
factors.trustSignals: Super Lawyers badge widget, Avvo badge linking to Gilland Chenault's profile, Super Lawyer 2021-2026 and Rising Star honors stated in bios, former district judge Of Counsel, court-appointed roles described.
factors.appointmentBooking: None — no Calendly or scheduling widget; consultations arranged by phone or contact form only.

sources.supports: firm name, lane (probate/trust/estate/fiduciary litigation), phone (972) 591-0099, footer address 1112 North Locust St. Denton TX 76201, practice areas, mediation services
Gilland Chenault bio; entered private practice 2004; established Chenault Law Firm January 2011; Super Lawyer 2021-2026, Rising Star 2015-2018; Baylor Law graduate
attorney roster: Gilland Chenault (Attorney), Courtland Kristoferson (Attorney), John Narsutis (Of Counsel, Former District Judge); contact form and phone
Kristoferson bio; admitted to State Bar of Texas 2016; Rising Stars 2024-2026; SMU Dedman School of Law; probate/trust/fiduciary/guardianship focus
Narsutis Of Counsel bio; Baylor JD 1972; legal career beginning 1973 (Assistant City Attorney); former judge of 16th Judicial District Court
Kristoferson admitted 2016, Rising Stars 2024-2026, Chenault Law Firm affiliation (corroboration)
Denton County Bar Association member listing; practice areas Real Estate, Wills-Trusts-Probate
corroboration: firm founded by Gilland Chenault, based in Denton County, probate/estate/trust litigation focus
contact form, phone (972) 591-0099, Google Maps embed (page 403s non-browser fetchers; retrieved with browser user agent)

unverified: public business email (none published on firm site or directories checked)
State Bar of Texas bar-card records not independently pulled; admission years per firm site and Super Lawyers
publicly reported notable cases or verdicts (none found in news or court coverage)
whether the Flower Mound address (4315 Windsor Centre Trail, Suite 500, TX 75028) shown on Super Lawyers/Avvo is a current second office or a prior location
notes: Legal entity name 'Law Office of Gilland Chenault, PLLC' appears on the firm's Trusts page; the site brands itself as 'The Chenault Law Firm'. Firm also operates a probate microsite at DentonProbateAttorney.com. Avvo badge on the homepage links to a Gilland Chenault profile under zip 75028 (Flower Mound), matching the Super Lawyers listing address — the firm's own current footer shows 1112 North Locust St., Denton, TX 76201, so Flower Mound is likely a prior office. Several subpages (contact, Kristoferson profile) return 403 to plain automated fetches but load with a browser user agent. Seed facts verified: Denton location, phone, and all three named attorneys confirmed; no corrections needed beyond adding address detail.
